title: croton draco var. hibisciformis
intro: Croton draco var. hibisciformis, also known as the red stem croton or dragon tree, is a variant of the Croton draco species, a tropical plant native to the Indian and Pacific island regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Croton draco var. hibisciformis include reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating rheumatic pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts, tinctures, or infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
